theme_and_archetype.description: A calming, frictionless, and tactile interface. Uses soft earthy tones to reduce the anxiety of job hunting and candidate filtering, heavily relying on card-based architecture with intentional motion.

spacing_and_layout.global_wrapper: bg-[#F7F6F2] min-h-screen flex justify-center items-center w-full
spacing_and_layout.mobile_container: w-full max-w-md h-[100dvh] bg-white shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col

tinder_card.style: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(28,43,35,0.08)] border border-[#E8E6DF] overflow-hidden relative w-full h-[65vh]
tinder_card.image_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 via-black/20 to-transparent
tinder_card.content_area: p-6 flex flex-col gap-3 h-[55%] bg-white
tinder_card.interaction: Use framer-motion useDrag. Rotate slightly based on drag X velocity. Overlays mint green opacity on drag right, tan/red opacity on drag left.

bottom_nav.style: absolute bottom-0 w-full h-20 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E8E6DF] flex justify-around items-center px-6 pb-safe z-50

buttons.primary: bg-[#A8D5BA] text-[#112217] font-medium rounded-full py-4 px-8 w-full active:scale-[0.98] transition-all shadow-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#D2B48C] text-[#2D1D09] font-medium rounded-full py-4 px-8 w-full active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex justify-center items-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#E8E6DF] text-[#1C2B23] font-medium rounded-full py-4 px-8 w-full hover:border-[#A8D5BA] transition-colors flex justify-center items-center gap-2
buttons.circle_action: w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform

forms.input: w-full bg-[#FAFAFA] border border-[#E8E6DF] rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#A8D5BA] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#A8D5BA] transition-all
forms.textarea: w-full bg-[#FAFAFA] border border-[#E8E6DF] rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#A8D5BA] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#A8D5BA] transition-all min-h-[120px] resize-none
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-[#1C2B23] mb-2 ml-1

match_badge.style: absolute top-4 right-4 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full font-semibold text-sm border border-white/20 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[#70AF88]

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Slide up with subtle fade. Spring tension: 300, friction: 30.
motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down to 0.95 on tap. Match score counts up incrementally on appearance.

icons_and_assets.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Duotone preferred for active states to add depth.

job_seekers.description: a man in a black hoodie standing in front of a tree
Man in white shirt smiling against a grey background
Young woman with short black hair wearing a black sweatshirt.

company_offices.description: Modern hallway with seating areas and artwork
a hallway leading to an office with a sign on the wall
an office with a bike parked in the middle of the room
green plants on white concrete floor

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary text (#1C2B23) meets APCA standard on #A8D5BA buttons.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the swipe cards, fallback to standard buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a mobile app layout locked to max-w-md mx-auto on desktop views to simulate the app structure.
Implement Framer Motion for the Job Card swiping logic. The card should rotate slightly based on horizontal drag distance.
Use the provided colors exactly. Do NOT default to Vercel/Shadcn standard black/white/zinc palette.
Use Outfit for all headings, Figtree for body text.
Avoid using generic HTML select or date inputs, use standard Shadcn primitives but heavily customize them with generous padding and soft 2xl border-radius.
Ensure the bottom navigation is fixed, styled like a floating 'pill' or anchored to the bottom with a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl).
Incorporate visual 'Match Scores' dynamically overlaid on the job cards with the tan or mint colors.
Do not use transparent headers without a backdrop blur if content scrolls behind.
